tasks.name: Fix MQTT Retry Delays Tuple
tasks.description: MQTT retry _delays tuple has 3 elements but only 2 are used. Restructure loop to use all 3 delays (4 total attempts). Update existing tests and add test for 4th-attempt success.

tasks.name: Extract SIGTERM Handler Context Manager
tasks.description: SIGTERM handler code is duplicated between _run_batch and _run_realtime. Extract into a _sigterm_cancels_current_task() context manager. Handler should be removed on exit. Test handler removal.

tasks.name: Extract OPC-UA Node Creation Helper
tasks.description: _build_inactive_nodes duplicates ~40 lines from _build_node_tree (folder hierarchy, EURange, EngineeringUnits, MinimumSamplingInterval). Extract shared _create_variable_node() helper. Both active and inactive paths call it. Pure refactor — all existing OPC-UA tests must pass.

tasks.name: Guard Overlapping OPC-UA Node Paths + Test
tasks.description: If custom config uses same opcua_node path in both profiles, _build_inactive_nodes crashes. Add guard to skip nodes already in self._node_to_signal with a warning log. Add test for overlapping path (skipped) and test for warning logged.

tasks.name: Remove Dead FactoryInfo.timezone Field
tasks.description: FactoryInfo.timezone defined but never read by any code. Remove the field. Check YAML configs and tests for references. All timestamps use UTC via time_utils.

tasks.name: Elevate OPC-UA Error Log Levels
tasks.description: OPC-UA sync errors (freeze failed, write failed) logged at DEBUG. Elevate to logger.warning for operational visibility. Keep DEBUG for routine messages only.

tasks.name: Return Defensive Copy from store.get_all()
tasks.description: store.get_all() returns internal dict directly. Use types.MappingProxyType for a zero-copy read-only view. Update return type to Mapping[str, SignalValue]. Add test_get_all_not_mutable. Check all callers work with read-only view.

tasks.name: Add I/O Error Handling in Ground Truth _write_line
tasks.description: _write_line has no I/O error handling. Wrap in try/except OSError: log warning, set self._fh = None to disable further writes. Test: mock write to raise OSError, verify subsequent calls are no-ops and warning logged.

tasks.name: Rename float32_hr_addresses to dual_register_hr_addresses
tasks.description: float32_hr_addresses also contains uint32 addresses. Rename to dual_register_hr_addresses across RegisterMap, all .add() calls, and parameter pass-through. Search entire codebase for old name.

tasks.name: Derive Modbus Update Interval from Config
tasks.description: Modbus sync loop hardcodes 50ms sleep. Derive from tick_interval_ms / 2 (half-tick for freshness). Add comment explaining the rationale. Uses self._config.simulation.tick_interval_ms.

tasks.name: Improve _compute_block_size Documentation
tasks.description: Improve docstring and inline comment for the +3 safety margin in _compute_block_size. Explain: pymodbus 1-based indexing (+1) + 32-bit value spans 2 registers (+2) = +3.

tasks.name: Explicit line_id in Packaging Config + ShiftChange HH:MM Validator
tasks.description: Two small fixes: (1) Add explicit line_id: packaging1 to config/factory.yaml MQTT section. (2) Add field_validator on ShiftChangeConfig.times to validate HH:MM format (regex + range check). Tests: valid times accepted, invalid format rejected, invalid values rejected, packaging config has line_id.

tasks.name: CI fail-fast: false + Validate All Fixes
tasks.description: Add fail-fast: false to CI unit test matrix strategy. Run ruff + mypy + pytest full suite. Fix any failures.
